---
title: "Anna"
format: pdf
---

## Anna - Contribution Statement

**Primarily responsible for:** RQ1, RQ2 Hypothesis test, GitHub and website deployment and formatting

**Key tasks:**

-   Built and evaluated the regression model and hypothesis test

-   Formatted the proposal and final statistical report

-   Deployed the website via GitHub

-   Wrote the Interpretations, Conclusion and Discussion

**Collaborative tasks:**

EDA, IDA, finding the dataset and licence, data context, research question design, final report review
